title: Storyboard · "Knock" — Radio→Animation production script · S10
body:
**Scene 10: 11:30–13:00 · The Note on the Whiteboard**

HERO FRAME: Close on a medical whiteboard in a hospital office · half-erased patient charts visible · in the center, written large in red dry-erase marker: "Walter — I tried. I am sorry. There is nothing more I can do. I love you. — David."

MOTION: kling — a slow camera push toward the whiteboard. The red ink seems to catch the light. The paper of a patient chart on a clipboard lifts slightly from a vent.

MOOD: Held love, broken time.

AUDIO: Walter: *"The note said: 'Walter — I tried. I am sorry. There is nothing more I can do. I love you. — David.'"*

source.label: Dimension X episode #05 (NBC Radio, May 6, 1950) adapting Fredric Brown's 1948 short-short story "Knock" (originally in *Thrilling Wonder Stories*, December 1948)

author: matt

witnesses.label: Rufinus of Aquileia, Commentary on the Apostles' Creed (c. AD 404)
Pirminius, De singulis libris canonicis scarapsus (c. AD 750) — earliest received form
Cited by every major catechism since 8th century
